# The World

> Interactive strategy long-read game about how geography and environment shaped civilizations.

## Primary URL
- https://alekseyshlykov.github.io/theworld/

## Project Summary
- Browser game inspired by "Guns, Germs & Steel".
- Built with React + TypeScript.
- Focuses on historical milestones, geography, resources, and societal development.

## Content and Usage
- This project is for reading/playing in a browser.
- Attribution requested when quoting project descriptions.
- License: CC BY-NC 4.0.
- Legal text: https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc/4.0/legalcode

## Contact
- Author: Alex Shlykov
